task: M77 clean iid MC efficient weight
description: Truth-at-B0 sample-size diagnostic using population-normalized iid shocks/noise and analytic iid efficient GMM weights W=(E[f_t f_t'])^{-1}.

configuration.dgp: population-normalized iid chi-square structural shocks and iid Gaussian residual noise; no sample standardization; no residual or recovered-shock demeaning
configuration.weighting: analytic pointwise iid efficient weights W=(E[f_t f_t'])^{-1}; no auxiliary large-sample weight simulation
configuration.diagnostic_scope: truth-at-B0 pointwise size only; no accepted-set projection shares
